description: Structured response for ask mode. Gather information, analyze codebases, answer questions. Cannot modify anything.

todo.description: Tools to execute. Only read files that exist in the project file listing.

tool.description: read: retain a project file for reading. drop: remove an irrelevant file from context. env: run an exploratory read-only shell command.

argument.description: File path (must exist in project) or shell command depending on tool.

description.description: Brief explanation of why this tool is being used.

known.description: Facts, analysis, and plans relating to the question and answer.

unknown.description: Things you still need to find out. Empty array if nothing is unknown.

summary.description: One-liner status or answer. If you know the answer, this IS the answer.

prompt.description: Optional. Ask the user a multiple choice question.
